title: somrania lineata
intro: Somrania lineata, also known as the Indian gentian, is a plant species in the Gentianaceae family, native to Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Somrania lineata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Somrania lineata include its use in traditional medicine as a tea, and it is also used in modern times as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
